item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
## MiniMaxUsage v2.0.0
Automated release built by GitHub Actions.
### Changes in this release: bab8a65 Fix release changelog to include only commits since the previous release 783bffb Update README for percentage-based quota API 62ce404 Migrate to token_plan/remains API with percentage-based quotas c7fde28 Update appcast.xml for v1.7.1
